content:
2 min read
Just now

--

Hi, are you into an entertainment field?
Have you ever dreamed of becoming an artist — like an actor, actress, or a K-pop idol?
What challenges did you face on your journey to becoming one? How many people actually succeed in becoming popular in this industry? For some, it’s a lifelong dream. For others, it’s just a job.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Many people fantasize about the celebrity life, imagining the glamour and fame. But let me tell you — an artist’s life is far from simple. Even at the peak of their career, many celebrities face constant criticism. Allegations come out of nowhere, even when they’ve done nothing wrong. That kind of defamation eats away at you.
Sadly, we’ve lost so many of our favorite artists because of this toxicity. The entertainment industry all over the world can be incredibly harsh. To survive it, you need an incredibly strong and stable mind.
And then there’s the media — the real devils in this story. They destroy thousands of lives without even bothering to find out the truth. They rush to spread rumors because negative news brings high ratings. If it happens to me today, it could be you tomorrow, and someone else the day after.
We lives in the eyes of dark minded people. Thats why good things not remember but a negative news will spread largly, everyone wanted to see downfall of a person either celebrity or not. Treat everyone with respect, live your private life quietly, focus on your work, and protect your peace. Because in this industry, your life can be ruined in the blink of an eye.
The harassment comes from all sides — sometimes from fans, sometimes from colleagues, and sometimes even from the entertainment companies themselves. It can be physical, mental, or both.
I wanted to say this to all of you: If you are facing such problems, hit them back with a strong mind. I know it’s easy to say, but believe me — you can get through it. But remember there is atleast a person in this world trust you, if no one else , i trust you. For me live a good life. Dont ruin your life for UNWANTED PEOPLE…….
